en: You're feeling it, aren't you? A survival instinct.
That's what drove me. That's what drives all of us.
And that's what's going to save us. Because I want to save all of us.
I'm sorry, I can't... I can't watch you go through this. I'm sorry.
I thought I could, but I can't.
I'm here. I'm here for you. Just listen to my voice, Cooper.
I'm right here. You're not alone.
Do you see your children? It's okay.
Did Professor Brand tell you that poem before you left?
ko: 브렌트 교수님이 죽기 전에 그 시를 읽어줬니?
